headline: Rodri contract talks with Man City stalled
body: Manchester City offered Rodri a new contract some months ago, but no agreement has been reached yet, with his current deal set to expire in June 2027.
text:
🚨 Manchester City offered new deal to Rodri few months ago but there’s still no agreement at this stage.
Deal on stand-by now, still long time to decide as current agreement set to expire in June 2027.
Rodri could leave as free agent in one year.
🎥 piped.video/K4Z8GebXIXo?is=i5Ck…
draft_caption:
REPORTED | Rodri contract talks with Man City stalled
